perturbation.original_text: Receiving Party shall return to Disclosing Party any and all records, notes, and other written, printed, or tangible materials in its possession pertaining to Confidential Information immediately if Disclosing Party requests it in writing.
perturbation.changed_text: Receiving Party shall retain copies of all records, notes, and other written, printed, or tangible materials in its possession pertaining to Confidential Information for archival purposes and shall only return the originals to Disclosing Party upon written request.
perturbation.explanation: The original text demands the return of 'any and all' materials upon request. The changed text allows the Receiving Party to retain copies for archival purposes, creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Time Periods. The nondisclosure provisions of this Agreement shall survive the termination of this Agreement and Receiving Party's duty to hold Confidential Information in confidence shall remain in effect until the Confidential Information no longer qualifies as a trade secret or until Disclosing Party sends Receiving Party written notice releasing Receiving Party from this Agreemen t, whichever occurs first.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text requires the return of 'any and all' confidential information upon request, implying no retention. The changed text permits the Receiving Party to retain copies for archival purposes. While the contradicted text specifies the duration of confidentiality obligations, the changed text allows the receiving party to hold on to archival copies indefinitely. These copies of the confidential information directly conflict with the obligation to hold Confidential Information in confidence and no longer qualifies as a trade secret or until Disclosing Party sends Receiving Party written notice releasing Receiving Party, which is stated in the contradicted text. Thus, the change creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The nondisclosure provisions of this Agreement shall survive the termination of this Agreement and Receiving Party's duty to hold Confidential Information in confidence shall remain in effect until the Confidential Information no longer qualifies as a trade secret or until Disclosing Party sends Receiving Party written notice releasing Receiving Party from this Agreemen t, whichever occurs first.
perturbation.changed_text: The nondisclosure provisions of this Agreement shall terminate automatically upon the completion of the project for which the confidential information was shared, regardless of whether the information remains a trade secret.
perturbation.explanation: Originally, the nondisclosure survives the agreement termination indefinitely until certain conditions are met (no longer trade secret or written release). The changed text introduces automatic termination upon project completion, creating a direct in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations of Receiving Party. Receiving Party shall hold and maintain the Confid ential Information in strictest confidence for the sole and exclusive benefit of the Disclosing Party. Receiving Party shall carefully restrict access to Confidential Information to employees, contractors, and third parties as is reasonably required and shall require those persons to sign nondisclosure restrictions at least as protective as those in this Agreement. Receiving Party shall not, without prior written approval of Disclosing Party, use for Receiving Party's own benefit, publish, copy, or otherwis e disclose to others, or permit the use by others for their benefit or to the detriment of Disclosing Party, any Confidential Information. Receiving Party shall return to Disclosing Party any and all records, notes, and other written, printed, or tangible materials in its possession pertaining to Confidential Information immediately if Disclosing Party requests it in writing.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that the nondisclosure agreement survives termination until the information is no longer a trade secret or a written release is provided. The changed text introduces a new condition for termination: the completion of the project, regardless of whether the information remains a trade secret. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states the Receiving Party must hold the information in confidence for the sole benefit of the Disclosing Party and restrict access, implying an ongoing obligation that is now undermined by the project completion clause. This fits the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction' as the agreement's terms regarding nondisclosure are defined inconsistently.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement expresses the complete understanding of the parties with respect to the subject matter and supersedes all prior proposals, agreements, representations, and understandings.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement outlines the key principles, but specific implementation details are subject to further agreements and understandings between the parties.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause is an integration clause, stating this is the *complete* understanding. The changed text suggests that other agreements are also relevant, contradicting the integration clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Integration. This Agreement expresses the complete understanding of the parties with respect to the subject matter and supersedes all prior proposals, agreements, representations, and understandings. This Agreement may not be amended except in a writing signed by both parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the agreement expresses the *complete* understanding of the parties. The changed text modifies this, stating that it outlines key principles but is subject to further agreements. This directly contradicts the 'Integration' clause, which asserts the agreement is complete and supersedes all prior understandings. Because the Changed Text contradicts the Contradicted Text by stating there are more agreements to be had, instead of a complete integration, there is a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The failure to exercise any right provided in this Agreement shall not be a waiver of p rior or subsequent rights.
perturbation.changed_text: If Disclosing Party fails to enforce any provision of this agreement within 30 days of a known breach, it will be considered a waiver of that right.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that failure to exercise a right is *not* a waiver. The changed text states it *is* a waiver after 30 days. This creates a direct contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Waiver. The failure to exercise any right provided in this Agreement shall not be a waiver of p rior or subsequent rights. This Agreement and each party's obligations shall be binding on the representatives, assigns, and successors of such party.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that failure to exercise a right is *not* a waiver. The changed text states it *is* a waiver after 30 days. This creates a direct contradiction. The contradicted text repeats the original text, stating 'The failure to exercise any right provided in this Agreement shall not be a waiver of p rior or subsequent rights.', thus meaning the Changed Text creates a direct contradiction, making the changed text incompatible with the contradicted text.
